title: Differentiated Chests
description: A simple resourcepack that lets you distinguish the difference between normal chest and trapped chest.
body:
The Differentiated Chests resource pack offers a visually distinct appearance for trapped chests and normal chests in the game. With this pack, trapped chests can be easily identified from normal chests, allowing players to quickly recognize and differentiate between the two types of chests in their Minecraft world. This enhancement provides a convenient visual cue, enabling smoother gameplay and better organization of items. The pack's carefully crafted textures ensure that players can effortlessly spot trapped chests and normal chests, adding a practical and aesthetic dimension to their gaming experience.

This resource pack is designed to enhance gameplay and streamline inventory management, making it an essential addition for players who value efficiency and attention to detail in their Minecraft adventures. Experience the convenience of instantly recognizing trapped chests and normal chests with the Differentiated Chests resource pack!

With this resource pack, players can enjoy the following benefits:

Clear visual differentiation between trapped chests and normal chests
Enhanced organization and inventory management
Sleek and polished textures for a seamless gaming experience
Upgrade your Minecraft world with the Differentiated Chests resource pack and make the distinction between trapped chests and normal chests effortlessly clear!
